backlog.feature: Admin UI wireframes and component library
backlog.description: Design wireframes for admin dashboard, product/category/promo/announcement/quote management pages, messages inbox, settings page. Create a Figma file or design document showing: layout structure, sidebar navigation, form layouts, data tables, modals, color palette (blue #1E40AF, red #DC2626), typography (Plus Jakarta Sans). Document component patterns for reusability across pages.
acceptance_criteria: Wireframes created for all 8 admin pages (dashboard, products, categories, promotions, announcements, messages, quotes, settings) — verify with design document
Component library documented: buttons, inputs, cards, tables, modals, badges, alerts — verify with design spec
Color palette and typography defined — verify with design tokens
Mobile responsive layouts sketched for key pages — verify with design document
Design approved by team before implementation begins — verify with sign-off

backlog.feature: Storefront UI wireframes and user flows
backlog.description: Design wireframes for storefront: homepage (hero, announcements, featured products, categories, trust section), products listing (filters, grid, pagination), product detail (gallery, variants, WhatsApp CTA, related products), contact page (form, map, info). Create user flows: browsing → product detail → WhatsApp order, contact form submission. Document mobile-first responsive design.
acceptance_criteria: Wireframes created for all 5 storefront pages (home, products list, product detail, contact, 404) — verify with design document
User flows documented: product discovery, WhatsApp order flow, contact submission — verify with flow diagrams
Mobile-first responsive layouts designed — verify with design document
Hero section, product cards, and CTA buttons designed with brand colors — verify visually
Design approved by team before implementation begins — verify with sign-off

backlog.feature: Design system and component specs
backlog.description: Create detailed design specifications for reusable components: Button (variants: primary, secondary, danger), Input (text, email, number, select), Card, Table, Modal, Toast, Badge, Sidebar nav item. Include states (default, hover, active, disabled, loading). Create a living style guide document with all components, spacing scale (4px grid), shadow definitions, and interaction patterns.
acceptance_criteria: Component specs created for 12+ components with all states — verify with design document
Spacing scale (4px, 8px, 12px, 16px, 24px, 32px) defined — verify with design tokens
Color palette with semantic tokens (primary, secondary, danger, success, warning) — verify with design system
Typography scale defined (h1-h6, body, caption) — verify with design document
Interaction patterns documented (hover, focus, disabled states) — verify with design spec

backlog.feature: Admin layout with sidebar navigation
backlog.description: Create app/admin/layout.tsx with a responsive sidebar layout. Sidebar includes: logo/brand, nav links (Tableau de bord, Produits, Catégories, Promotions, Annonces, Messages, Paramètres), user info with logout button, collapsible on mobile. Use shadcn/ui Sheet for mobile, fixed sidebar for desktop. Brand colors: blue (#1E40AF) sidebar background, white text. Show unread message count badge on Messages link.
acceptance_criteria: app/admin/layout.tsx renders sidebar + main content area — verify by visiting /admin
Sidebar shows all 7 nav links with Lucide icons — verify visually
Active link is highlighted — verify by navigating between pages
Mobile: sidebar collapses into hamburger menu using Sheet — verify at mobile viewport
Logout button calls signOut and redirects to /admin/login — verify by clicking
Messages link shows unread count badge — verify with unread messages in DB

backlog.feature: Admin dashboard page
backlog.description: Create app/admin/page.tsx (dashboard) showing key metrics cards: total products, active products, total categories, unread messages, active promotions. Include a recent messages list (last 5) and quick action buttons (Ajouter un produit, Nouvelle promotion). Use shadcn/ui Card components. Data fetched via Server Components calling server actions directly.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows 5 metric cards with correct counts from DB — verify by comparing with DB data
Recent messages section shows last 5 messages with sender name, subject, date — verify visually
Quick action buttons link to /admin/products/new and /admin/promotions/new — verify navigation
Page is a Server Component (no 'use client') — verify file has no use client directive
Loading states handled with Suspense boundaries — verify by checking for Suspense wrappers

backlog.feature: Products management pages (list, create, edit)
backlog.description: Create app/admin/products/page.tsx with a data table listing all products (name, category, price, stock, active status, actions). Add search/filter by category and active status. Create app/admin/products/new/page.tsx and app/admin/products/[id]/edit/page.tsx with forms using shadcn/ui (Input, Select, Textarea, Switch, Button). Form fields: name, description, price (CFA), compareAtPrice, category, images (URL inputs), featured, active. Use server actions for mutations with optimistic UI or revalidation.
acceptance_criteria: Products list page shows all products in a table with sortable columns — verify by visiting /admin/products
Search filters products by name — verify by typing in search
Category filter dropdown filters products — verify by selecting a category
Create form validates all fields and creates product — verify by submitting valid data
Edit form pre-fills existing product data — verify by clicking edit on a product
Delete button shows confirmation dialog then deletes — verify by deleting a product
Price displayed in CFA format (e.g., 15 000 FCFA) — verify visually

backlog.feature: Categories, promotions, announcements management pages
backlog.description: Create CRUD pages for categories (app/admin/categories/), promotions (app/admin/promotions/), and announcements (app/admin/announcements/). Each has a list page with table/grid and create/edit forms. Categories: drag-to-reorder or order input. Promotions: discount type toggle (percentage/fixed), date range picker, promo code field. Announcements: type selector (banner/popup/info), rich text body, date range, active toggle. All forms use shadcn/ui components and validate with Zod.
acceptance_criteria: Categories page lists categories with reorder capability — verify by reordering
Promotions page shows active/expired status based on dates — verify visually
Announcement form has type selector with 3 options — verify by creating each type
Date range picker works for promotions and announcements — verify by selecting dates
All forms show French validation errors — verify by submitting empty forms
Successful mutations show French toast notifications — verify by creating/updating

backlog.feature: Messages inbox and site settings pages
backlog.description: Create app/admin/messages/page.tsx as an inbox-style interface: list view with unread indicators, click to expand message detail, mark as read, archive, delete actions. Badge shows unread count. Create app/admin/settings/page.tsx for site settings: grouped form sections (Informations générales, Contact, Réseaux sociaux, Apparence). Each section editable inline with save button. Use optimistic updates for settings.

Clicking a message shows full content and marks as read — verify by clicking unread message
Archive and delete actions work with confirmation — verify by archiving/deleting
Settings page shows grouped sections with current values — verify by visiting /admin/settings
Updating a setting saves immediately with success toast — verify by changing a value
Phone numbers displayed as editable list (add/remove) — verify by adding a phone number

Create components/MediaPicker.tsx (client component) with modal that lists media, allows selection, and returns selected media URL to parent form. Use shadcn/ui Dialog, Input, Button. Integrate MediaPicker into product/category create/edit forms to replace raw URL inputs.

Search filters media by filename or alt text — verify by typing in search

backlog.feature: Shared UI components and design system
backlog.description: Install and configure shadcn/ui components needed across the app: Button, Input, Card, Table, Dialog, Sheet, Select, Textarea, Switch, Badge, Toast (via Sonner), DropdownMenu, Separator, Label, Form. Configure Tailwind with brand colors as CSS variables (--brand-blue, --brand-red). Set up Plus Jakarta Sans via next/font. Create a shared PageHeader component and DataTable component for admin reuse.
acceptance_criteria: shadcn/ui components installed in components/ui/ — verify folder contents
Brand colors available as Tailwind utilities (bg-brand-blue, text-brand-red) — verify in CSS/tailwind config
Plus Jakarta Sans loaded via next/font in root layout — verify by inspecting font in browser
PageHeader component renders title, description, and optional action button — verify with tsc --noEmit
DataTable component wraps @tanstack/react-table with sorting, filtering, pagination — verify with tsc --noEmit

backlog.feature: SEO metadata and Open Graph defaults
backlog.description: Configure app/layout.tsx with default metadata: title template 'Page | Dakar Sport', description, Open Graph defaults (site name, locale fr_SN, type website), Twitter card. Create app/(store)/opengraph-image.tsx for dynamic OG images. Add robots.txt and sitemap.ts that dynamically lists all product and category pages. Set canonical URLs.
acceptance_criteria: Default metadata includes title template, description, OG defaults — verify with view-source on homepage
robots.txt accessible at /robots.txt — verify by visiting URL
sitemap.xml lists homepage, /produits, /contact, all product slugs, all category pages — verify by visiting /sitemap.xml
Each page has unique title via metadata export — verify on products and contact pages

backlog.feature: Image upload utility with local storage fallback
backlog.description: Create lib/upload.ts with an uploadImage(file) function that stores images. For MVP, store in public/uploads/ with unique filenames. Design the interface so it can be swapped to Cloudinary/S3 later (return URL string). Create an ImageUpload React component (client component) with drag-and-drop, preview, and remove functionality for use in admin forms.
acceptance_criteria: lib/upload.ts exports uploadImage() returning a URL string — verify with tsc --noEmit
API route app/api/upload/route.ts handles multipart form data — verify with tsc --noEmit
ImageUpload component shows drag-and-drop zone, preview, remove button — verify visually
Uploaded files saved to public/uploads/ with unique names — verify by uploading a file
Component works in product and category create/edit forms — verify by using in form

backlog.feature: Error handling, loading states, and not-found pages
backlog.description: Create app/not-found.tsx (global 404), app/(store)/not-found.tsx (store 404 with navigation), app/admin/not-found.tsx (admin 404). Create app/error.tsx and app/admin/error.tsx for error boundaries. Add loading.tsx files for key routes (admin/products, admin/messages, store products). All pages in French with helpful navigation links. Style consistently with brand.
acceptance_criteria: Global 404 page shows friendly French message with link to homepage — verify by visiting /random-path
Admin 404 shows admin-styled page with link to dashboard — verify by visiting /admin/random-path
Error boundary catches runtime errors and shows retry button — verify with tsc --noEmit
Loading states show skeleton or spinner for admin product list — verify by adding artificial delay
All error/loading pages use brand styling — verify visually

backlog.feature: CSV/PDF export utilities and product duplication action
backlog.description: Create lib/export.ts with: exportToCsv(columns, rows) returning CSV string, exportToPdf(title, columns, rows) returning PDF buffer. Create lib/actions/products.ts enhancement: duplicateProduct(id) that clones product with all variants and images, appends '(copie)' to name. Add 'Dupliquer' button to product list and detail pages. Add 'Exporter' button to product list, messages list, quotes list that downloads CSV. Use pdfkit for PDF generation.
acceptance_criteria: exportToCsv() generates valid CSV with headers and rows — verify by exporting and opening in Excel
exportToPdf() generates valid PDF with title, table, formatted prices — verify by exporting and opening
duplicateProduct() creates new product with same name + '(copie)', all variants, all images — verify by duplicating
Duplicate product has different ID and slug — verify in DB
Product list has 'Exporter' button that downloads all products as CSV — verify by clicking
Messages list has 'Exporter' button that downloads as CSV — verify by clicking
Product detail page has 'Dupliquer' button that creates copy and redirects — verify by clicking

backlog.feature: Rate limiting and CAPTCHA on contact/quote endpoints
backlog.description: Install rate-limit middleware (e.g., Ratelimit from Upstash or simple in-memory). Add rate limiting to: POST /api/contact (5 per hour per IP), POST /api/quotes (3 per hour per IP). Optionally add hCaptcha or reCAPTCHA v3 to contact form (silent, no user interaction). Create lib/rate-limit.ts with reusable middleware. Add CAPTCHA_SECRET to .env.example if using.
acceptance_criteria: Rate limiting middleware installed and configured — verify with tsc --noEmit
Contact endpoint returns 429 after 5 requests per hour from same IP — verify by making requests
Quote endpoint returns 429 after 3 requests per hour from same IP — verify by making requests
CAPTCHA (optional) integrated into contact form — verify by inspecting form HTML
Rate limit headers (X-RateLimit-Remaining) returned in response — verify with curl
.env.example includes rate limit config and CAPTCHA_SECRET if used — verify file contents

backlog.feature: Structured data (JSON-LD) and analytics setup
backlog.description: Add JSON-LD structured data to pages: Organization schema (name, logo, contact, address) in root layout, Product schema on product detail pages (name, price, image, description, availability), BreadcrumbList on category/product pages. Integrate Vercel Analytics (or Plausible) for traffic tracking. Add event tracking: product view, WhatsApp click, quote request, contact form submit. Create lib/analytics.ts with trackEvent(name, data) helper.
acceptance_criteria: Organization schema in app/layout.tsx with Dakar Sport info — verify with schema.org validator
Product schema on product detail pages with all required fields — verify with schema.org validator
BreadcrumbList schema on category and product pages — verify with schema.org validator
Vercel Analytics or Plausible script loaded in layout — verify by checking Network tab
trackEvent() helper logs events to analytics service — verify with tsc --noEmit
Product view, WhatsApp click, quote request tracked — verify by checking analytics dashboard
Analytics dashboard shows traffic, top products, conversion funnel — verify by visiting dashboard
